As an ensemble, we particularly love the unexplored corners of early music repertoire. To make this music more accessible, we are publishing the modern performing editions we have created based on manuscript sources and historical sources.

Name Dates Piece Instrumentation Link
d' A mbruys, Honoré
late 1600s Le doux silence de nos bois Voice, B.C. Google Drive
C harpentier, Marc-Antoine
1643 - 1704 Sans frayeur dans ce bois Voice, B.C. Google Drive
J ohnson, Robert
1582-1633 Full Fathom Five Voice, B.C. Google Drive
M orin, Jean Baptiste
1677 – 1745 Enone Voice, 2 x Dessus, B.C. Google Drive
